body_txt: Buxom women are commonly considered more attractive , so those who are flat-chested tend to be self-conscious of their size . But there are girls who see their lack of assets as a plus. This may either come off as a humorous form of coping , or it may be played straight. Flat chests are usually associated with the young, and a girl with Petite Pride will play this up as much as she can, usually to make herself seem cute and innocent . They also avoid many symptoms of D-Cup Distress and have an advantage in playing sports where big breasts might get in the way. Sweet Polly Olivers and Wholesome Crossdressers tend to find flat chests useful as well. Contrast A-Cup Angst , Big-Breast Pride , or Buxom Beauty Standard and Proud Beauty . Compare D-Cup Distress . Anime Fan Speak calls this sort of character Pettanko .
